original_record.body:
Hi Alex,

We are writing to confirm that your team has been successfully onboarded to the new project dashboard since your last meeting last Tuesday. The resources have been deployed, and we are currently monitoring the metrics closely. If you have any questions about the new interface or workflow, please refer to the attached handbooks or contact the IT support team directly at 2-800-555-0199.

We expect to see positive growth in your quarterly metrics by the end of this quarter. Please verify your login credentials if you haven't already. No action is required from your side, and we appreciate your continued partnership with the company.

Best regards,

Sarah Jenkins

Project Manager

Sales & Operations Division
original_record.subject: Your quarterly metrics have been released and verified
original_record.label: safe

judge_result.overall_feedback: This email appears to be a legitimate business communication. It's well-written, professional, and contains no obvious phishing indicators. The sender is plausible, and the content aligns with a typical project update.
